records.ety: [L., the book of Exodus, Gr. <?/ a going or marching out; <?/ out + <?/ way, cf. Skr. ā-sad to approach.]

defs: A going out; particularly (the Exodus), the going out or journey of the Israelites from Egypt under the conduct of Moses; and hence, any large migration from a place.
The second of the Old Testament, which contains the narrative of the departure of the Israelites from Egypt.
